name: notifications_mark_all_read
description: Bell → NotificationCenter → MARK ALL READ. Verifies the FeedScreen top-nav bell opens NotificationCenterScreen with unread rows present, the MARK ALL READ affordance clears them, and returning to the feed leaves the bell badge gone. iOS oracle: NotificationCenterView.swift. Status DRAFT: the bell button + notification rows don't carry stable testTags yet — the flow drives by visible text (the 'Notifications' screen title + 'MARK ALL READ ›' affordance both render identically on both platforms).
